---
title: "session1"
author: "jolynecujoh233"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-03"
---

---
Setup chunk
设置代码块全局选项
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# knitr 是 RMarkdown 用来渲染文档的工具
# opts_chunk$set() 用来设置所有代码块的默认行为
# echo = TRUE 表示在生成的 PDF 中显示代码
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# theme_set() 用于设置之后所有 ggplot 图的默认主题
# theme_minimal() 是一个简洁风格的主题
theme_set(theme_minimal())
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r palette}
# Custom colours 创建一个命名颜色向量
# 方便后续画图统一使用

pal <- c(
  nus_blue     = "#003D7C",
  blue         = "#2E75B6",
  nus_orange   = "#EF7C00",
  ice          = "#D6E8F7",
  grey         = "#6B7D8C"
)
```

```{r}
# list.files() 用于列出文件夹中的文件
# full.names = TRUE 表示返回完整路径
# read_csv() 读取 CSV 文件
# 这里会读取文件夹中所有文件（如果有多个会合并）
resident_row <- read_csv(list.files('D:/Data', full.names = TRUE))
```

```{r}
View(resident_row)
```

```{r}
glimpse(resident_row)

```

```{r}
resident_row %>%
  count(Time) %>%
  arrange(Time)%>% # 按年份排序
  print(n=30)
```

```{r rename}
residents <- resident_row %>%
  rename(
    planning_area = PA,
    subzone       = SZ,
    age_group     = AG,
    sex           = Sex,
    dwelling_type = TOD,
    residents     = Pop,
    year          = Time
  )

glimpse(residents)
```

```{r}
# 计算不同 subzone 的数量
n_distinct(residents$subzone)
```

```{r}
# 统计不同住宅类型数量
residents %>% 
  count(dwelling_type)
```

---
按规划区汇总人口
Aggregate population by planning area
---

```{r}
residents %>% 
  group_by(planning_area) %>% 
  summarise(total_resident=sum(residents)) %>% 
  mutate(  #add 列
  size_category = case_when(
    total_resident >= 400000 ~ "Large",
    total_resident >= 200000 ~ "Medium",
    total_resident >= 100000 ~ "Small",
    total_resident >= 0 ~ "Very small",
    TRUE ~ "Unpopulated"
  ))
```

---
简化住宅类型
Simplify dwelling categories
---

```{r simplify-dwelling}
residents <- residents %>%
  mutate(
    dwelling_broad = case_when(
       # str_detect() 用于检测字符串是否包含某个模式
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "HDB 1")           ~ "HDB Small (1–2 Room)",
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "HDB 3")           ~ "HDB 3-Room",
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "HDB 4")           ~ "HDB 4-Room",
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "HDB 5|Executive") ~ "HDB Large (5-Room+)",
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "Condominium")      ~ "Condo / Apartment",
      str_detect(dwelling_type, "Landed")           ~ "Landed",
      TRUE                                          ~ "Other / HUDC"
    )
  )

# 查看分类是否成功
residents %>%
  count(dwelling_broad, dwelling_type) %>%
  arrange(dwelling_broad)
```

---
宽格式转换
Convert to wide format
---

```{r wide-dwelling}
dwelling_wide <- residents %>%
  filter(year == 2025) %>%
  group_by(planning_area, dwelling_broad) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(residents, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = dwelling_broad,
    values_from = total,
    values_fill = 0
  )

dwelling_wide %>% head(5)
```

```{r}
residents %>% 
  group_by(year) %>% 
  summarise(total = sum(residents)) -> sg_annual

sg_annual
```

```{r}
ggplot(data = sg_annual,aes(x=year,y=total)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = pal['nus_blue']) + # 使用自定义颜色
  geom_point(colour = pal['nus_orange']) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Singapore pop 2020-2025",
    caption = "Data:Singapore Dept of Statistics",
    y = "residents",
    x = "year"
  )
```

---
关注特定规划区
Focus on selected planning areas
---

```{r}
# 设定关注区域
focus_areas <- c("Punggol", "Sengkang", "Bedok", "Tampines", "Toa Payoh", "Queenstown")

residents %>% 
  group_by(year, planning_area) %>% 
  summarise(total = sum(residents)) -> annual_by_pa

annual_by_pa
```

```{r}
# 按年份和规划区汇总人口
annual_by_pa <- residents %>%
  group_by(year, planning_area) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(residents, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# 查看汇总结果（可选）
annual_by_pa

# 绘制折线图
annual_by_pa %>%
  filter(planning_area %in% focus_areas) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = total, colour = planning_area)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 1.2) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0,NA)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = 'Dark2')

```
